mapper.insert: insert into document_assignments (document_assignment_id, company_id, document_id, assignee_user_id, assigned_by_user_id, status, assigned_at, updated_at) values (#{documentAssignmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assignedByUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assignedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update document_assignments set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, document_id = #{documentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_user_id = #{assigneeUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assigned_by_user_id = #{assignedByUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assigned_at = #{assignedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where document_assignment_id = #{documentAssignmentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
